AboutWindow.title: About Me
AboutWindow.name: I Wayan Agus Darmawan
AboutWindow.bio: Computer Engineering graduate (2025) with experience in full-stack web development, having completed over 20 freelance projects. Skilled in building responsive web applications, dashboards, and custom solutions using React and Express, delivering scalable and user-friendly software for a wide range of clients. In addition to web development, I have experience in robotics software, contributing to ROS-based autonomous robots and inspection systems, which strengthened my ability to integrate software with hardware, implement navigation and control systems, and ensure reliable performance in real-world environments. I am passionate about creating innovative solutions that combine technical excellence with practical usability, solving challenging problems, and delivering projects that create meaningful impact.
